{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ghostwater's Life Well
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater's Life Well]] reinforced [[Lindon]]'s lifeline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
